subject: Call script — Buddy Meacham (homebound, gap ~9 mo)
body: Buddy, this is Chad Lewis from First Baptist. Pastor Whitlow asked me to check on you before the holidays. How is Diane? …

subject: Call script — Homer Eller (homebound, gap ~8 mo)
body: Homer, Chad Lewis from First Baptist. Wanted to check on you and Marlene before the cold sets in. …

subject: Call script — Ottis Dodson (homebound, gap ~9 mo)
body: Ottis, Chad Lewis from First Baptist. Pastor asked me to give you a call. …

subject: Warm note — 2026 bereaved households (Pastor to review)
body: Dear friend, we have missed you at the table this year and we are keeping you in prayer as the holidays draw near. If there is anything we can carry for you — a ride to a service, a meal, a visit — please say the word. In Christ, Pastor Whitlow and the Outreach Committee.
